title: The lost files
description: They DESPISE you in their world. Please leave, they don't want you in it.
body:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

this pack includes the broken script, which will most likely corrupt and kick you from your world, proceed with caution.

</details>



You were digging through your old stuff to take with you when you move out and find an old USB titled "Minecraft version 0.0". Wondering why this nonexistent version was in your stuff, you boot it up, and launch a new world. Upon entering the world you notice it seems like just old minecraft alpha or beta, until you notice that for some reason new update features are in it too. This shouldnt be happening, its an old version of minecraft right? By day 3, you feel your being watched. 

 

They dont want you here. This is their world, their version. And you shouldnt be in it.



If you ever feel like reporting bugs or just chatting, feel free to join the discord!

https://discord.gg/vw2kZeBUu2
